title: EchoVerse
description: Explore, Fight, Build and Engineer with EchoVerse a Fun, Optimized and Active Modpack. Enjoy playing with You're friends Free using e4mc, minetogether and coming soon essential mod
body:
# **Echoverse**

## PERFORMANCE MODDED MINECRAFT
Using some of _the best_ performance/optimization mods. you can run **Echoverse** on _almost_ any computer.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I'm sorry dell optiplex users, i said almost for a reason.

Example; my computer spec's are 1070 and a ryzen 2600x 32GB's of ram 
</details>



### EXPLORE, CREATE, FIGHT, and get (_decently_) High FPS.
- Play with friends using e4mc, minetogether, and COMING SOON essential mod.
- Have fun **_FIGHTING BOSSES,_** **_BUILDING FACTORIES,_** **_TORTURING YOU'RE FRIENDS_** and **_~~SURVIVING!~~_**





***_NOTE_** * _All performance claims are not guaranteed_ 

Share you're suggestions, ideas, bugs, and builds over on the **Echoverse** [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/rsnzKpm6jq)

Check out the projects I'm using in my modpack!
